title: DefaultPrinter
text: DefaultPrinter Specifies that the print destination will be restored to the default printer at the end of a print job. DefaultPrinter = FALSE | TRUE Default value None File section [printer] Example [printer] DefaultPrinter=TRUE Copy Related Links Define a Logical Printer On Windows, you can define a logical printer, which is a named collection of printer settings for a physical printer. You can define more than one logical printer for the same physical printer. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
